title: The action of a nilpotent group on its horofunction boundary has finite orbits
publisher: European Mathematical Society - EMS - Publishing House GmbH
abstract:
We study the action of a nilpotent group 
            
              G
            
             with finite generating set 
            
              S
            
             on its horofunction boundary. We show that there is one finite orbit associated to each facet of the polytope obtained by projecting 
            
              S
            
             into the torsion-free component of the abelianisation of 
            
              G
            
            . We also prove that these are the only finite orbits of Busemann points. To finish off, we examine in detail the Heisenberg group with its usual generators.
